quotes.text: Your network is your net worth. But your net worth is also your network's network's net worth. It's turtles all the way down.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Pricing is how you tell the market what you're worth. Charge too little and you'll go out of business. Charge too much and you'll go out of business faster.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every business model is just 'charge money for value' with extra steps.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Pricing is a feature. Charge more than you think and deliver more than you promised.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your SaaS should be so good that canceling feels like a loss, not a relief.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your SaaS should be good enough that customers forget they're paying for it until the invoice arrives.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your product's value is measured in time saved, not features added. Add features that save time.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to raise prices is when your customers say 'that's it?' when you tell them the price.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to reduce churn is to make your product indispensable. Not by locking people in. By being too useful to leave.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Money follows value. Create enough value and the money will come.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Data is the new oil. But like oil, it's useless until you refine it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to raise prices is when you've delivered enough value that customers won't blink.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you can't explain your product's value in one sentence, you don't understand it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The ability to perform deep work is becoming increasingly rare at exactly the same time it is becoming increasingly valuable.
quotes.author: Cal Newport

quotes.text: Your most valuable customers are the ones who stick around. Retention is the ultimate metric.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best indie hacker tool is the one that saves you 10 hours a week. If it saves you 10 minutes, it's not worth building.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to add monetization is when you have users who'd miss your product if it disappeared.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your indie project should be good enough that users would be sad if it disappeared.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your indie project's first $100 in revenue is worth more than your first 10,000 free users.
quotes.author: based
